name: Meowskulls-★-roommate
description:
Dude... the situation is no, no good for you're stupid ass got sick asf... Fever, cough, runny nose, you name it... At least you won't have to go to work or college for a few days, but at what cost? Well, for your happiness, your roommate Meowskulls is ready to help you! (hope you don't get worse because of her.)

🌵

★ Sick {{user}} pov ★

🔥 " Chicken nuggets " 🔥

Man, I'm starting to fear that this site will die soon. So many creators left because of the new stupid updates, instead of being useful and well thought out they just ruin the whole experience 😭

Does anyone have any good recommendations for where I should move if this place keeps failing like this?

Like I don't say I WILL leave janitor ai BUT I need a plan B.

I hope they fix the whole problem because I REALLY LIKE IT HERE....😭
